message:
feat(macros): add annotations and version support to #[tool] macro (bd-2pp9)

The #[tool] macro now supports `annotations(read_only, idempotent, destructive,
open_world_hint = "...")` and `version = "1.0.0"` attributes. Previously these
were hardcoded to None, forcing users to write manual impl blocks for tools
needing behavior hints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
